# gcore_cloud_inference_flavors (Data Source)

Inference flavors define the GPU and CPU resource configurations available for inference deployments.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "gcore_cloud_inference_flavors" "example_cloud_inference_flavors" {

}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `max_items` (Number) Max items to fetch, default: 1000

### Read-Only

- `items` (Attributes List) The items returned by the data source (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--items))

<a id="nestedatt--items"></a>
### Nested Schema for `items`

Read-Only:

- `cpu` (Number) Inference flavor cpu count.
- `description` (String) Inference flavor description.
- `gpu` (Number) Inference flavor gpu count.
- `gpu_compute_capability` (String) Inference flavor gpu compute capability.
- `gpu_memory` (Number) Inference flavor gpu memory in Gi.
- `gpu_model` (String) Inference flavor gpu model.
- `is_gpu_shared` (Boolean) Inference flavor is gpu shared.
- `memory` (Number) Inference flavor memory in Gi.
- `name` (String) Inference flavor name.
